title: [MTR4+JCM] US PIDS Pack
description: This resource pack adds various PIDS from the United States to Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This is a resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway 4 that adds PIDS from various cities in the United States.

## Currently Included PIDS
- Chicago CTA (platform mode, used for PIDS 1A)
- Chicago CTA (station mode, used for RV PIDS)
- WMATA (old LED variant)
- WMATA (new LCD variant)
- Chicago CTA bus PIDS
- WMATA bus PIDS (orange variant)
- WMATA bus PIDS (white variant)
- NYC Subway A Division
- NYC Subway B Division
- NYC Subway B Division (new design)
- NYC Subway 7 Train Variant
- NYC Subway L Train Variant
- SEPTA (small)
- SEPTA (large)
- BART
- LA Metro
- Sound Transit
- Amtrak platform LED PIDS
- Amtrak station LCD PIDS

## Future Plans
### v4.2
- Improve PIDS projector compatibility
- Add gray variant of new WMATA PIDS
- Add new variant of LA Metro PIDS
- Add clock to CTA PIDS station mode
### v5.0
- Add Long Island Railroad PIDS
- Add Miami Metro PIDS

## Pack Dependencies
- [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) v4.0.0+
- [Joban Client Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm) v2.0.0+
